headline: How The NetApp (NTAP) Story Is Shifting With Memory Costs And Flash Cloud Expectations
summary: NetApp’s latest analyst update keeps the core fair value estimate anchored at US$117.93, while Street price targets now range from the high US$80s to around US$128. That spread reflects very different reads on how memory and component costs, flash storage positioning, and public cloud exposure could shape the risk and reward profile. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and track the evolving narrative around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: Why NetApp (NTAP) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of data storage company NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) jumped 3.1% in the afternoon session after the company announced a strategic alliance with data protection firm Commvault and unveiled a new generation of high-performance storage systems.
